name: epub-to-pdf
description: Convert EPUB and PDF bidirectionally with calibre's ebook-convert: EPUB to PDF preserves layout for analysis, PDF to EPUB compresses and reflows for ereaders.

interface.shortDescription: Convert EPUB and PDF bidirectionally with calibre's ebook-convert: EPUB to PDF preserves layout for analysis, PDF to EPUB compresses and reflows for ereaders.
interface.longDescription: Run ebook-convert to translate between EPUB and PDF, then validate output size and structure before saving to research/sources/.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use EPUB to PDF safely.
